title: External substrate learning plan completed
body: Shadowed Glimmering Night completed the future strategic plan and companion non-plan insights note from the external skills substrate study. Output: .agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/future/external-skills-substrate-learning.plan.md and .agent/research/agentic-engineering/operating-model-and-platforms/external-skills-substrate-non-plan-insights-2026-05-14.md. Both indexes updated. Targeted self-checks, privacy search outside ignored reference-local, markdownlint stdin checks, and git diff --check passed.
